cause: Fixed probe transformations contained post-execution masking or blending that was not expressible as an Agent canonical Program.
invariants: every fixed beta arm materializes from one public versioned Program template
ProbeAPI executes only runtime.executor programs and performs no hidden post-processing
fast and slow Agents receive the fixed parameterization contract
probe output is byte-identical to execution of its materialized canonical Program
all parameter bindings use deployment-observable features only
operator_changes: hampel_filter exposes optional public global_z_min intrinsic targeting gate
